About Armstrong Plumbing & Heating

Mark and Sarah Armstrong built this firm on punctuality, tidy work and honest quotes.

We are a Leeds-based team of Gas Safe registered engineers serving homeowners and landlords across West Yorkshire.

Every job starts with a clear written quote. We use shoe covers and dust sheets as standard—not as an upsell.

  • Gas Safe registered (612847 demo)
  • £5m public liability insurance
  • Manufacturer-approved boiler installs
  • Landlord CP12 specialists

Need a plumber this week?

Tell us what is wrong—we will call you back within one working hour.

Get a quote
